title: Sum25
description:
Write a program that inputs 7 digits (0 ≤ each digit ≤ 9) and counts the number of ways one can extract a set of digits to sum to 25. The digit '0' means 10, not 0.

This input:

5 0 1 5 4 3 7

yields five different sums to 25:

5 0       3 7
5   1 5 4 3 7
5 0 1 5 4
  0 1   4 3 7
  0   5   3 7
input: A single line with seven single digit integers.
output: A single line that tells the number of subsets that sum to 25.
source: Olympiad, USA Computing Olympiad, 2000-2001 Season, USACO Winter 2001 Contest, Orange
